agreementText: By accessing and using Dolphin Markets Ltd's services, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our services.
onlineTrading: Online forex and CFD trading services via MetaTrader 5
accountRequirements: To open and maintain an account with us:
requirement1: You must be at least 18 years old
requirement4: Maintain only one account per individual
requirement5: Notify us of any changes to your information
rule1: You are responsible for all trading decisions
rule2: Trades are executed at the current market price
rule3: Leverage amplifies both profits and losses
rule4: Margin requirements must be maintained at all times
fundRule1: Deposits must come from accounts in your name
fundRule3: Withdrawal methods must match deposit method when possible
fundRule4: Anti-money laundering verification may be required
riskText: Trading forex and CFDs involves substantial risk. Past performance is not indicative of future results. You should only trade with money you can afford to lose. CFDs are complex instruments and carry a high risk of losing money rapidly due to leverage.
prohibit1: Engage in fraudulent or illegal activities
prohibit3: Use automated trading systems without approval
prohibit5: Violate any applicable laws or regulations
liabilityText: Dolphin Markets shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages resulting from your use of our services.
amendmentsText: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Changes will be effective upon posting on our website. Continued use of our services constitutes acceptance of modified terms.
contactText: For questions regarding these Terms & Conditions, please contact us at legal@dolmarkets.com.
